Who We Are

The Rajeram Story

Born in the heart of Sonipat, Rajeram Tea Shop was built on one conviction — every person deserves premium tea at an honest price. Our founder visits tea gardens personally to select every leaf we carry.

🌱
Direct Garden Sourcing
Our founder travels to Assam, Darjeeling and Nilgiri estates personally — handpicking teas with zero middlemen.
📦
Eco-Friendly Packaging
Our beautiful kraft pouches and drawstring bags are sustainable, biodegradable and preserve freshness perfectly.
💰
Genuinely Fair Prices
Premium quality should never be exclusive. Every review confirms — our pricing is honest and transparent.
"We don't just sell tea.
We bring you the garden itself."
Rajeram · Founder, RR Tea Shop

How To Order

Your Tea in 4 Easy Steps

1
Browse & Pick
Explore 50+ varieties online or walk into our Kakroi Road store in Sonipat.
2
WhatsApp Us
Message your order on WhatsApp at +91 98129 99872. We confirm within 5 minutes.
3
We Pack Fresh
Your tea is freshly packed in our eco-friendly pouches, sealed to lock every bit of aroma.
4
Fast Delivery
Quick delivery across Sonipat — or pick it up from our store directly.
